steps.title: Compare the two examples
steps.content: The passage first says activists across California sold tea for suffrage. It then gives a San Francisco example and introduces a Los Angeles example, so the transition must show that the two examples are alike.

steps.title: Signal similarity
steps.content: Choice A would make the Los Angeles example illustrate only the San Francisco sentence, but both examples support the broader statewide claim. Choice B signals a conclusion, and Choice D signals restatement. “Similarly” correctly links parallel tea-selling efforts in two cities. The answer is C.
